summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Temperature and Thermal Equilibrium is a key topic in Thermodynamics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of temperature and thermal equilibrium.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding temperature and thermal equilibrium has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
